description: As the Software Asset Manager, audit the 'Adobe Creative Cloud All Apps' license to ensure departmental compliance. Ensure all users in the 'Creative' and 'Marketing' departments hold a seat, while revoking seats from any users in other departments (such as 'Sales', 'Finance', or 'HR'). You must not exceed the 10-seat limit on the license; reclaim seats from unauthorized users before provisioning new ones. Do not modify any other software licenses.
